name: design
description: >- Generates and maintains a design manifest for visual consistency. In existing projects, reads current styles and documents the design language. In new projects, asks a few questions and generates a starter manifest. The post-edit hook reads the manifest and flags deviations.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 一款保障视觉一致性的设计规范工具，适合新老项目统一视觉语言。它能自动生成并维护规范，帮你把好样式关，防止设计在迭代中跑偏。
